segments.lat: in Tusculanum nos venturos putamus aut Nonis aut postridie. ibi ut sint omnia parata (plures enim fortasse nobiscum erunt et, ut, arbitror, diutius ibi commorabimur) ; labrum si in balineo non est, ut sit, item cetera quae sunt ad victum et ad valetudinem necessaria. vale . K. Oct. de Venusino.
segments.eng: We expect to reach the Tusculan villa either on the Nones or the day after. See that everything there is ready --- there will be several of us, perhaps, and I think we shall be staying for some time. If there is no tub in the bath, see that there is one; likewise whatever else is needed for food and for health. Farewell. The Kalends of October, from the Venusian district.
